modules.name: Learn
modules.title: If Alternatives Lessons
modules.instructions: Learn alternative ways to express conditional meaning using unless, as long as, provided that, and other conditional connectors.

modules.name: Write
modules.title: Conditional Alternatives Writing
modules.instructions: Write sentences using different conditional alternatives to express conditions, exceptions, and requirements.

modules.name: Play
modules.title: If Alternatives Games
modules.instructions: Play games to practice transforming if-clauses into alternative conditional structures.

modules.name: Quiz
modules.title: If Alternatives Quiz
modules.instructions: Test your knowledge of conditional alternatives and their correct usage in different contexts.

modules.name: Apply
modules.title: Conditional Challenge
modules.instructions: Apply conditional alternatives correctly in complex sentences and real-life situations.
